name: glossbot
description: Track deferred code suggestions and tech debt directly from pull request comments.

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/templates', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('templates/glossbot.yml', 'dist/templates/glossbot.yml');"
scripts.build:action: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const cp=require('child_process'); if (!fs.existsSync('action/generate.ts')) { console.log('Skipping action build: no action source yet'); process.exit(0); } cp.execSync('tsc -p tsconfig.action.json', { stdio: 'inherit' });"

author: Michael Batrakov
